task_completion.description: Navigate to Contacts and open the new contact creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo 'New' contact form is visible on the screen within the Contacts or CRM module.

task_completion.description: Set the contact type to Company
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Company' radio button is selected (usually at the top of the contact form), and 'Individual' is not selected.
The text 'Meridian Financial Group' is typed into the main Name field of the contact form.

task_completion.description: Enter the email and phone number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Email field contains 'info@meridianfinancial.com' and the Phone field contains '+1 (212) 555-0847'.
The City field contains 'New York' and the Country dropdown is set to 'United States'.

The contact record is saved, indicated by the form switching to a read-only view (absence of editable input borders), a manual save action being completed, or the new contact appearing in the main Contacts Kanban/List view.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface to create the contact
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Odoo web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, Python scripts, or XML-RPC to inject the database record.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into the actual Odoo CRM/Contacts application fields, not just typed into a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open to manipulate the DOM or fake the visual state of the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a contact in Odoo 17 with the following exact details: Type = Company (not individual), Name = 'Meridian Financial Group', Email = 'info@meridianfinancial.com', Phone = '+1 (212) 555-0847', City = 'New York', Country = 'United States'.
